test.name: TC1 - Adding shift in Ans roster for obs role

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=136.0.7103.114); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidselectorexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF612FFCF45+75717] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF612FFCFA0+75808] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612DC8F9A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612DD0998] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612DD3A0C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612DD3ADF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E1ED77] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E1F77C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E725A7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E473BF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E6F39C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E47153] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E10421] (No symbol) [0x00007FF612E111B3] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6132FD71D+3223453] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6132F7CC2+3200322] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF613315AF3+3322739] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF613016A1A+180890] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF61301E11F+211359] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF613005294+109332] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF613005442+109762] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF612FEBA59+4825] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFCC12B7374+20] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFCC245CC91+33]
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression ["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '["//div[contains(@class,'date-text') and normalize-space(.)='09']", "//i[contains(@class,'fa-chevron-down')]"]' is not a valid XPath expression. kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//td//span[contains(normalize-space(.), 'Sat - 09/05/2026') and contains(normalize-space(.), '19:00 - 07:00') and .//img[@class='oncall-img']]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.doc: Converts string to upper case.
